refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall provide detailed worksite area analysis including terrain mapping, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation to support planning and execution.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed to explicitly identify key sub-functions that collectively fulfill the worksite mapping/modeling requirement, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-FR by demonstrating accurate terrain maps, reliable obstacle detection, and correct work-zone representation through simulation and field data comparison.
sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

candidate_dps: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition
Apply real-time data processing algorithms for feature extraction
Implement a geospatial database for work-zone representation and updates
selected_dp.selected_dp: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain mapping and obstacle detection algorithms
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection, minimizing cross-module dependencies and enabling modular updates.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity LIDAR and camera sensors integrated into the NGHE solution
Risk of sensor data noise affecting mapping accuracy
Risk of real-time processing delays impacting work-zone updates
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing data processing algorithms separately if sensor fusion complexity increases.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level integration and processing of worksite mapping and modeling functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle module

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with Safety Services and remote monitoring

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core processing and integration occurs here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle provides raw sensor data but does not process mapping; moderate diffusion risk if processing is duplicated.
Receives processed data but should not perform mapping; risk if mapping logic is duplicated.
Primarily consumes safety alerts; minimal role in mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping and modeling in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports high safety criticality.
containment_risks: Potential for data latency if processing centralized
Risk of overloading NGHE Solution module with multiple responsibilities
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor processing load and consider offloading non-critical functions to Vehicle or Teleoperation if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR sub-functions with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of duplicating sensor data processing in Vehicle or Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module for mapping, reducing diffusion risk.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests using telemetry and tasking interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of mapping functions to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Review processing load on NGHE Solution module in subsequent design iterations.
Ensure interface definitions are strictly followed to avoid diffusion.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the requirements and safety criticality constraints with acceptable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Provide terrain mapping of the worksite area
Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensors are available and integrated
Processing capabilities of NGHE Solution module are sufficient
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of sensor fusion algorithms
System integration test results for mapping accuracy and latency
